title: Project Explorer Menu
description:
Project Explorer Menu

Project Explorer Command

Select this to open the [Project Explorer] pane.

The Project Explorer pane enables you to quickly open any file in the current project or jump to any function. The project files and functions are organized in a sorted tree structure.

Open a file or jump to a function: Double-click on the item.

Symbol	Description

a	Collapses
		 all items.

b	Unfolds
		 all items.

c	Displays
		 files except project build.

		Right-click on an item except the project build. Select [Add To
		 Project] from the displayed context menu to add it to the project.
